activities_projects.title: Mean Change Investigation
activities_projects.objective: Study how the mean changes when values are added or removed
steps: Add a value greater than the mean and calculate the new mean
Remove one value and observe the change
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands effect of data changes on mean

activities_projects.title: Balancing Distances Activity
activities_projects.objective: Verify that the mean balances distances in a dataset
steps: Take a dataset of five numbers
Find distances of numbers from the mean
Check if the total distances on both sides are balanced

activities_projects.title: Median Impact Study
activities_projects.objective: Investigate how adding numbers affects median
steps: Write 7 numbers and find the median
Add a number smaller than the median
Add a number greater than the median

activities_projects.title: Frequency Table Project
activities_projects.objective: Calculate mean and median using frequency tables
steps: Collect data of family sizes of 15 classmates
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy of table and calculations (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Spreadsheet Marks Analysis
steps: Enter marks of 10 students in 5 subjects
Use SUM formula to find totals
Use AVERAGE formula to calculate subject averages

activities_projects.title: Temperature Trend Graph
activities_projects.objective: Create and interpret a line graph
steps: Collect daily temperature data for one week

activities_projects.title: Rainfall Data Comparison
steps: Select rainfall data for three cities

activities_projects.title: Cycle Usage Data Study
steps: Observe a dot plot showing number of cycles used
